blocks.text: Carlsen Begins His World Championship Quest — April Fools' Day Is No Joke

Wednesday delivers a chess double-header with Magnus Carlsen at the centre. The stakes couldn't be higher: FIDE Candidates Round 1 determines who challenges for the world crown. Meanwhile, Wærenskjold rolls through Belgium on two wheels.
Magnus Carlsen opens his FIDE Candidates campaign — the road to the World Chess Championship begins now
Dwars door Vlaanderen — Søren Wærenskjold is Norway's sole starter in this punchy Ronde warm-up
Carlsen also opens Grenke Chess Freestyle Open in Karlsruhe — preparation thrown out the window
